name: Genshin Impact RPG | Explore The World of Teyvat
description:
Welcome to the world of Teyvat.

This RPG includes:

— Full and complete information about most characters of the game (Some might be missing, but they'll be added!)

— Monsters and Bosses

— Leveling-up system

— The Seven Nations

— And more deep, otherworldly lore you can find out about!



As of 01/07/26, the RPG has been updated to include post v6.0 locations and characters (Nod-Krai, Flins, etc.)

As of 01/21/26, I've completely updated the bot's lorebook, and it's much complete now, although misses some stuff like brief entries of the seven nations. I'll update the bot occasionally for lorebook changes, and to reduce tokens/transfer them to the lorebooks.


I HIGHLY RECOMMEND USING GEMINI PROXY WITH THIS BOT!!!
creator: M0rax
